mnemonics: I Traverse Silently, Carefully Planting (Insertion, Traversal, Searching, Copying, Processing)
keyPoints: Tree insertion follows BST rules: left for smaller, right for larger values
Traversals (Inorder, Preorder, Postorder) determine node processing order
Searching uses BST properties to efficiently locate values by comparing and branching
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle empty trees (null nodes) in recursive operations
Confusing traversal orders (mixing up when to process root vs children)
Creating shallow copies instead of deep copies when duplicating tree structure
